description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/santetis/open_source/santetis_image and defines a before_script that exports PATH to include ~/.pub-cache/bin, activates the Dart grinder package globally with `pub global activate grinder`, and runs `pub get`. Add a single stage named test and a job called test that runs the command `grind test`. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, or special rules.
